hero.title: Brew Your Future: Master the Art of Coffee
hero.subtitle: From bean to cup, and from training to employment. Join Rwanda’s premier training center to gain world-class barista skills and the career support you need to succeed.

benefits.title: Why Choose Usafi Barista Training Center?
benefits.subtitle: We offer more than just a certificate; we offer a pathway to a career.

item1.title: Comprehensive Curriculum
item1.description: Learn from industry experts like Sandrine Gasarasi and Ishimwe Ebenezer. Our curriculum covers everything from Espresso & Milk techniques to Coffee Shop Business management, ensuring you are ready for the market.

item2.title: Flexible Learning Options
item2.description: Study on your own terms. Choose our Onsite program in Rubangura Plaza for hands-on intensity, or our E-Learning platform to study theory from anywhere at your own pace.

item3.title: Real Career Support
item3.description: We don't just teach; we connect. Gain access to exclusive internship opportunities at top local hotels and cafés, job alerts via the Usafi Community, and professional interview preparation.

hero.title: Cultivating Coffee Excellence in Rwanda.
hero.description: Located in the heart of Rubangura Plaza, Usafi Barista Training Center is more than just a school; it is a launchpad for careers in the hospitality industry. We bridge the gap between passion and profession, providing aspiring baristas with the technical skills, business knowledge, and confidence needed to thrive in the world of coffee.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To empower individuals with world-class barista skills and practical business knowledge, connecting them to sustainable employment and entrepreneurship opportunities within the growing coffee industry.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become the premier destination for coffee education in Rwanda, raising the standard of service and coffee quality across the region.

leadership.title: Meet the Experts Behind Your Training

director.name: Sandrine Gasarasi
director.description: As the driving force behind Usafi, Sandrine represents a commitment to quality and student success. Under her leadership, the center focuses not only on making the perfect cup of coffee but on shaping the character and work ethic of professional baristas.

mentorship.title: Expert Mentorship
mentorship.description: Our training team, led by experienced professionals like Ishimwe Ebenezer, brings years of industry experience directly to the classroom. They don't just teach theory; they share real-world insights, techniques, and the secrets of the trade that you won't find in textbooks.

represent.title: What We Represent
represent.description: "Usafi" stands for cleanliness, purity, and excellence. We represent a new generation of baristas who understand that coffee is an art form. From hygiene and safety to advanced latte art, our students graduate ready to work in top-tier cafés, hotels, and restaurants.

cta.title: Ready to join the Usafi family?

courses.title: Professional Barista Courses
courses.subtitle: Choose the learning path that fits your lifestyle and career goals.

onsite.title: Onsite Training
onsite.description: Best for students who want intensive, hands-on practice with professional equipment.
features: Direct access to commercial Espresso Machines & Grinders
Networking with peers in the classroom

online.title: E-Learning
online.description: Best for students with busy schedules or those living outside Kigali.

curriculum.title: Comprehensive Module Breakdown
curriculum.description: Whether you study Online or Onsite, our curriculum covers the essential pillars of the coffee industry.

m1.title: Introduction to Coffee
m1.description: History of coffee, bean varieties (Arabica vs. Robusta), and processing methods.

m2.title: Barista Basics & Equipment
m2.description: Understanding the espresso machine, grinder calibration, and tamping techniques.

m3.title: Espresso & Milk Science
m3.description: Perfecting the espresso shot (extraction) and mastering milk steaming (micro-foam).

m4.title: Latte Art
m4.description: Techniques for pouring hearts, rosettas, and tulips.

m5.title: Hygiene & Maintenance
m5.description: Machine cleaning protocols and workspace safety standards.

m6.title: Customer Service
m6.description: Building customer loyalty, body language, and service adaptation.

m7.title: Bonus: Coffee Shop Business
m7.description: Business planning, menu pricing, marketing, and startup tips.

notes.title: Student Notes
notes.description: All students receive access to comprehensive PDF Notes covering Barista Basics, Customer Service, Hygiene & Safety, and Business Advice.
notes.badge: Available for view online or download.

cert.title: Official Certification
cert.description: Upon successful completion of the course (and passing the final practical/theory tests), you will receive a Certificate of Completion from Usafi Barista Training Center.
cert.badge: A recognized credential to boost your CV.

cta.title: Ready to Start Brewing?
cta.description: Seats fill up quickly for our Onsite classes. Secure your spot today or start learning online immediately.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: We'd Love to Hear From You
contact.description: Whether you have questions about our courses, need support with your application, or want to schedule a visit, our team is here to help.

careerSupport.title: Launch Your Career
careerSupport.subtitle: Beyond the Certificate: Your Pathway to Professional Success
careerSupport.description: At Usafi Barista Training Center, our commitment to you doesn't end when you finish your course. We provide a robust support system designed to transition you directly from training into employment or entrepreneurship.

internship.title: Gain Essential Work Experience (Internship)
internship.description: Hands-on training is complemented by real-world experience. Our program places you directly into working environments where you can apply your skills and build a professional network.

requirements.title: Requirements
list: Successful completion of the Core Barista Curriculum.
Strong attendance and performance during training.

partnerships.title: Partnerships
partnerships.description: Usafi Barista Training Center actively partners with leading local cafés, hotels, and hospitality groups in Kigali to secure quality placement opportunities.

howToApply.title: How to Apply
howToApply.description: Internship slots are competitive. Students must complete an internal application form and participate in a mock interview to qualify.

cv.title: CV Writing & Recs
cv.description: Receive personalized coaching on crafting a compelling CV tailored to the hospitality sector. We also provide recommendation letters for top graduates.

alerts.title: Job Alert Networks
alerts.description: Access opportunities via our exclusive network and Usafi Community WhatsApp groups. Learn to leverage LinkedIn and Hospitality Jobs.

interview.title: Interview Preparation
interview.description: Learn research techniques, proper attire, and non-verbal communication. Access sample interview videos to visualize success.

certificates.title: My Certificates
certificates.subtitle: View and download your earned credentials.
certificates.subtitle_alt: Manage and export your verified professional certifications

empty.title: No certificates found
empty.description: Keep brewing to earn your next badge from Usafi!
empty.description_alt: Complete your strategic modules and excel in evaluations to unlock verified professional credentials.

inclusion.title: Accessible Training, Inclusive Careers
inclusion.subtitle: Commitment to Inclusion and Adaptation
inclusion.description: Usafi Barista Training Center believes that passion for coffee knows no limits. We are committed to fostering an inclusive learning environment and adapting our curriculum to ensure accessibility and success for all students, including those with disabilities.

hearing.title: For Students Who Cannot Hear & Speak
list: Visual-First Instruction: Heavy reliance on visual demonstrations, written step-by-step procedures, and clear diagrams for practical modules.
Communication Tools: Whiteboards, digital tablets, and written communication for immediate Q&A.
Peer Support: Partnership with hearing peers for seamless teamwork.

mobility.title: For Mobility & Physical Limitations
list: Ergonomics Review: Guidance on adaptive tools and workspace modifications (e.g., lower counters).
Safety First: Physical assistance during heavy-lifting tasks or maintenance.

service.title: Inclusive Service Training
service.description: A critical component of our training is ensuring that all graduates can effectively serve every customer.

ordering.title: Visual Ordering
ordering.description: Training on using digital screens or written pads for taking orders from customers who are hard of hearing or non-verbal.

etiquette.title: Service Etiquette
etiquette.description: Education on respectful interaction and communication best practices when serving people with various disabilities.

awareness.title: Accessibility Awareness
awareness.description: Understanding café layout, seating, and restroom accessibility requirements.

consultation.title: Discussing Your Needs
consultation.description: We encourage prospective students to schedule a private consultation with our Director, Sandrine Gasarasi, before applying. This allows us to understand your specific needs and confirm how we can best adapt the environment for your success.

enrollment.title: Apply Now: Secure Your Spot
enrollment.subtitle: Join the Usafi Barista Training Center
enrollment.description: Create your student account and complete your application. After submission, your application will be reviewed for approval.

fullName.label: Full Name
fullName.placeholder: As it should appear on your certificate

password.label: Create Password
password.hint: You will use this password to log in to the student portal.

referral.label: How did you hear about Usafi?

errors.email_in_use: This email is already registered. Please log in instead.
errors.weak_password: Password should be at least 6 characters.

payment.title: Payment Details & Financial Policy
payment.description: Application is confirmed upon receipt of payment. We offer flexibility through the following channels:

flexibility.title: Payment Flexibility
flexibility.description: We allow students to pay the tuition fee in installments, as per our standard agreement. Details will be sent to your email after registration.

policy.title: Icyitonderwa (Important Note)
policy.subtext: (All tuition fees paid are strictly non-refundable.)
policy.details: Please ensure you are fully committed to your chosen course and study method before making a payment.

gallery.title: Our Community in Action
gallery.subtitle: Photos & Videos of Training Sessions
gallery.description: Get a visual feel for the hands-on learning environment at Usafi Barista Training Center. This gallery captures the passion, focus, and camaraderie shared between our students and instructors.

clip1.title: Daily Life at Usafi
clip1.desc: A fast-paced montage of the training center.

cta.title: See the Action for Yourself
cta.description: Schedule a visit to our Rubangura Plaza center to experience the training environment firsthand.

equipment.title: The Right Tools for the Job
equipment.subtitle: Essential Equipment for Your Professional Coffee Setup
equipment.description: Starting a coffee shop requires more than just passion—it requires the right gear. This guide covers the foundational tools needed to ensure efficiency, quality, and consistency, whether you're setting up a full-scale café or a small espresso bar.

espresso.title: Espresso Machine
espresso.subtitle: The heart of your business.
espresso.description: Choose based on volume needs (single-group vs. multi-group). A reliable machine delivers consistent pressure and temperature for the perfect extraction every time.

grinder.title: Coffee Grinder
grinder.subtitle: As important as the machine itself.
grinder.description: A quality grinder ensures uniform particle size for perfect extraction. Inconsistent grinds lead to uneven flavor and wasted beans.

tamper.title: Tamper
tamper.description: Ensures a level and compacted coffee bed for even extraction. Calibrated tampers recommended for consistency.

pitcher.title: Milk Pitcher
pitcher.description: Stainless steel required for steaming milk. Have various sizes (350ml, 600ml) for different drink orders.

knock.title: Knock Box
knock.description: Used for disposing of used coffee pucks cleanly. Must be durable (stainless steel/rubber) and easy to wash.

scales.title: Digital Scales
scales.description: Precision is vital. Used for dosing grounds accurately and measuring extraction yield by weight.

cups.title: Cups & Glasses
cups.description: Ceramic mugs for dine-in. Demitasse for espresso. Insulated, eco-friendly cups for takeaway.

storage.title: Inventory Storage
storage.description: Airtight containers/hoppers to keep roasted beans fresh and away from moisture.

pos.title: Point of Sale (POS)
pos.description: Essential software for managing orders, tracking sales patterns, and accepting payments.

node_modules.title: Cleaning Kit
node_modules.description: Dedicated kit for daily back-flushing, group head scrubbing, and steam wand cleaning.

agents.title: Specialized Agents
agents.description: Use only approved food-grade detergents and descaling chemicals safe for your machine.

gear.title: Safety Gear
gear.description: First aid kit immediately accessible. Non-slip floor mats behind the bar.

pricing.title: Price Ranges & Sourcing
pricing.description: Prices vary widely based on brand, capacity, and condition. Here are general guidelines for budgeting your startup:

advice.title: Sourcing Advice:
advice.description: Consider starting with high-quality refurbished equipment to manage initial costs. We provide students with a list of trusted local and international suppliers.

pricing.cta_sub: Learn detailed business planning, sourcing, and cost analysis in our Coffee Shop Business module.

blog.title: Usafi Insights
blog.subtitle: Your Source for Coffee Tips, Industry News, and Business Advice
blog.description: The Usafi Blog is where passion meets expertise. Stay updated on the latest trends in the coffee world, get valuable advice for your career, and find inspiration for your entrepreneurial journey.

posts.empty: No posts found in this category.

p1.title: The Secret to Perfect Micro-Foam
p1.snippet: Mastering the vortex is key to creating that silky, paint skills needed for latte art.

p2.title: Must-Know Startup Tips for Your First Coffee Shop
p2.snippet: From location scouting to menu pricing, here are the 5 pillars of a successful café launch.

p3.title: Spotlight on Our Latest Graduating Class
p3.snippet: Celebrating the hard work and dedication of the Batch 12 graduates.

p4.title: How to Ace Your First Barista Interview
p4.snippet: Confidence, hygiene, and coffee knowledge. Here is what employers are really looking for.

newsletter.title: Don't Miss an Update!
newsletter.description: Subscribe to the Usafi mailing list to receive our latest insights and job alerts directly in your inbox.

testimonials.title: Success Stories
testimonials.subtitle: Hear From Our Graduates
testimonials.description: The true measure of our training is the success of our alumni. Read and watch how Usafi Barista Training Center helped turn passion into a profitable profession, landing graduates jobs in top hospitality establishments or launching their own businesses.

featured.title: From Student to Shop Owner: Alex's Story
featured.description: Alex shares how the Coffee Shop Business module provided the practical framework and supplier connections needed to open their café just six months after graduation.

grace.text: "Before Usafi, I knew nothing about coffee science. After the Onsite course, I was confident enough to apply for the internship. Usafi placed me at a partner hotel, and they hired me full-time two months later. The career support was invaluable."
grace.name: Nyamwiza Aidah

kevin.text: "The attention to detail on espresso extraction and milk texturing was phenomenal. I can now consistently produce high-quality drinks, which is noticed by my customers. My Latte Art skills alone set me apart from other candidates."
kevin.name: Umwali Ratifa

patience.text: "I completed the E-Learning course while working my night shift. The video lessons and downloadable PDFs were perfect for self-study. I highly recommend Usafi for anyone who needs flexibility but doesn't want to compromise on quality."
patience.name: Munyaneza Eric

cta.title: Ready to Write Your Own Success Story?

thankyou.description: Thank you for applying to Usafi Barista Training Center. We have sent an email with payment details and your next steps.

attempt_limit.desc: You are allowed to take the Quiz 3 times only (3 Attempts only)

retake_policy.title: Re-evaluation Policy
retake_policy.desc: On Academic transcript if you don't get final marks of 70% you pay a fee of 20k to redo the quizzes you failed

passed.desc: Exceptional performance. Your understanding of this module has been successfully encoded. Premium advancement is now authorized.

failed.title: Sync Interrupted
failed.desc: The evaluation threshold was not met. Strategic recalibration is required before another extraction attempt is authorized.

donations.description: Your visit helps us fund scholarships for talented individuals who lack the means to study. Turn your fun weekend into someone else's professional future.

donations.header_desc: Your direct contribution funds scholarships for talented Rwandans who lack the financial means to access professional training.

booking.booking_confirm_desc: Your weekend adventure is confirmed. We've sent the details to {{email}}.

weekendExperience.title: Weekend Coffee Experiences
weekendExperience.subtitle: Pour & Create
weekendExperience.description: Whether you're a curious traveler, a coffee enthusiast, or just looking for something extraordinary to do this weekend — our doors are open. Dive into the world of specialty coffee with our expert baristas.

group_discount.title: The more friends, the more you save!
group_discount.desc: Bring your team, your family, or your fellow coffee lovers and enjoy automatic group discounts.

weekendExperience.combos_description: Our curated combo packages bundle the best experiences together at a special price. Perfect if you want to make a full day of it — or come back again knowing there's more to discover.
weekendExperience.click_card_hint: Click any card to see what you'll do in that experience.

gallery.title:
Real Weekends,
Real Stories
gallery.subtitle: Photos and videos posted directly by our team from real weekend sessions. Every frame is a moment that happened here.

what_to_expect.title: What to Expect
what_to_expect.desc: Everything you need to know before your visit so you can focus on enjoying every sip.

book.title: Book Online
book.desc: Choose your activity or combo, select a Saturday or Sunday, and securely pay online.

arrive.title: Arrive & Meet Your Barista
arrive.desc: Come to our school 15 minutes early. Your expert barista instructor will welcome you, brief you, and make sure you're comfortable before you begin.

enjoy.title: Create, Learn & Enjoy
enjoy.desc: Dive in! Everything is provided — aprons, equipment, ingredients. Your only job is to enjoy, learn, and take great memories (and coffee!) home.

donate_cta.title: Turn Your Fun Into Someone's Future
donate_cta.desc: Your visit already helps us run these sessions. But a donation goes further — it funds scholarships for talented Rwandans who cannot afford professional barista training. A few thousand RWF changes a life.

booking.personal_desc: One last step — fill in your info and complete payment.
booking.alert_weekend: Please choose a Saturday or Sunday — we only host on weekends!
booking.session_desc: Choose your date, number of participants, and activity.
booking.special_requests_hint: Dietary restrictions, accessibility needs, language preferences...
booking.success_desc1: A confirmation has been sent to
booking.success_desc2: We can't wait to see you on

weekendExperience.card_hint: 💡 Click any card to see what you'll do in that experience.

latte_art.title: Latte Art Masterclass
latte_art.subtitle: Pour & Create
latte_art.description: Pour hearts, rosettas, and tulips under the guidance of our professional baristas. From milk-steaming science to freehand designs, you'll leave with a new skill to impress.

sensory_tasting.title: Sensory Cupping Session
sensory_tasting.subtitle: Taste & Discover
sensory_tasting.description: Explore the complex terroir of Rwandan specialty coffee. Learn to identify flavor notes — from fruity highlands to chocolate lowlands — using professional tasting protocols.

bean_to_bag.title: Bean to Bag: Roasting Fun
bean_to_bag.subtitle: Roast & Take Home
bean_to_bag.description: Witness the transformation of green coffee beans into aromatic perfection. You'll hand-roast a batch and take home a personalized bag of your creation.

espresso_workshop.title: Espresso Extraction Workshop
espresso_workshop.subtitle: Pull & Perfect
espresso_workshop.description: Learn the engineering behind a perfect espresso shot — grind size, pressure, temperature, and timing. Pull real shots on our professional La Marzocco machines.

equipment_tour.title: Equipment & Tools Deep Dive
equipment_tour.subtitle: Learn & Understand
equipment_tour.description: A guided tour through professional barista equipment — grinders, scales, tampers, and brewing devices. Understand what you need to build your home setup.

coffee_preparation.title: Farm to Cup Experience
coffee_preparation.subtitle: Process & Brew
coffee_preparation.description: Follow the entire coffee preparation journey — from the washing station process to manually brewing. Experience every step from cherry to your cup.

cold_brew.title: Cold Brew & Signature Drinks
cold_brew.subtitle: Mix & Chill
cold_brew.description: Craft your own cold brew, learn the chemistry behind it, then create signature coffee cocktails (non-alcoholic). Perfect for the creative mind.

barista_basics.title: Barista Basics Bootcamp
barista_basics.subtitle: Learn & Practice
barista_basics.description: A condensed version of our professional Barista Course. Get the core fundamentals — milk, espresso, hygiene, and customer service etiquette — in a single morning session.

combos.title: Combo Packages
combos.desc: Bundle the best experiences at a special price. Make a full day of it and discover more.

coffee_lover.title: Coffee Lover's Duo
coffee_lover.tagline: The perfect starter combo — taste & create.

barista_journey.title: The Full Barista Journey
barista_journey.tagline: Everything a barista needs to know in one day.

origin_explorer.title: Origin Explorer's Pack
origin_explorer.tagline: Trace Rwanda coffee from farm to your cup.

ultimate.title: The Ultimate Experience
ultimate.tagline: The absolute best of everything we offer. Unforgettable.

gallery.subtitle: Photos and videos posted directly by our team from real weekend sessions. Every frame is a moment that happened here.
